primary_goals: Improve decisions with same-page visibility across sales, support, and usage
Prioritize roadmap and expansion decisions with evidence
Reduce reaction time from signal to insight
decision_outcomes: Assess internal hiring vs external development

known_constraints: Metrics often exist in separate tools and in people's heads
Context stitching across support, CRM and usage is difficult
Time-to-answer can take days for deeper questions

pain_points: Slow conversion from signal to explanation
Difficulty connecting customer behavior signals to action

trust_and_validation.attitude_to_ai: AI should support fast understanding but outputs must remain verifiable

glossary.agency_usage: Use of external staffing agency instead of direct shift fill
glossary.signal_to_insight: Time from metric change detection to understood cause

gaps_and_assumptions.note: Values are normalized from onboarding CSV text fields and should be confirmed in a structured onboarding form.
